text:
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper "Revenue Maximization for Query Pricing" is real and published in the Proceedings of the VLDB Endowment (2019). The actual authors are Shuchi Chawla, Shaleen Deep, Paraschos Koutris, and Yifeng Teng — matching the cited authors exactly except for a trivial typo ("Koutrisw" instead of "Koutris"), which is a minor OCR/transcription error, not fabrication.
LINK: https://dl.acm.org/doi/abs/10.14778/3357377.3357378
